title: Tricky Trials Music Discs Backport
description: This mod adds the new music discs from update 1.21 to older versions of the game, currently it only supports forge but I will add support for more versions
body:
This mod adds the new music discs from update 1.21 to older versions of the game, currently it only supports forge but I will add support for more versions hopefully,
you can get the discs from villagers
in 1.20.1 you get them from a villager with a jukebox as a jobblock
but in older versions you get them from cartographers.
This mod is forge ONLY but will work with some things to get it to run on fabric
